cmds.description: Returns a friendly greeting message.
Provides a welcome message to the user.
Provides a list of available commands and their descriptions.
Returns a goodbye message to the user.
Engages the AI chatbot for a conversation. (must include the prefix '!' or '$' before the command and the model is optional, example: !ai gpt-5-nano or $ai gpt-5-nano 'text')
Returns the current timezone of the server.
Returns the current date. (You can also specify a timezone, example: !date zone:America/New_York or $date zone:America/New_York)
Returns the current date and time. (You can also specify a timezone, example: !datetime zone:America/New_York or $datetime zone:America/New_York)
Returns the current time. (You can also specify a timezone, example: !time zone:America/New_York or $time zone:America/New_York)
Tells a random joke.
Provides an inspirational quote.
Provides contact information for support.
Provides a weather update. (You can specify a location, example: !weather zone:New York or $weather zone:New York)
Provides a list of popular games.
Provides a list of popular movies.
Provides a list of popular animes.
Provides a list of popular podcasts.
Provides a list of available AI models for the !ai command.
Evaluates a mathematical expression. (example: !calc 2+2 or $calc 2+2)
Calculates age based on birth year. (example: !calcage 1990 or $calcage 1990)
Counts down to a specific date. (example: !countdown 2024-12-31 or $countdown 2024-12-31)
Counts up from a specific date. (example: !countup 2020-01-01 or $countup 2020-01-01)
Converts units of measurement. (example: !convert value:100 unit:meters to:feet or $convert value:100 unit:meters to:feet)
Provides a random source of inspiration.
Provides a random motivational message.
Provides a list of radio stations by country. (example: !radiostations zone:USA or $radiostations zone:USA)
Provides a YouTube playlist based on a topic. (example: !youtubeplaylist topic:lofi or $youtubeplaylist topic:lofi)
Converts pressure units. (example: !convertpressure value:1000 unit:hPa to:psi or $convertpressure value:1000 unit:hPa to:psi)
Converts speed units. (example: !convertspeed value:1 unit:km/h to:mph or $convertspeed value:1 unit:km/h to:mph)
Converts energy units. (example: !convertenergy value:1000 unit:J to:kcal or $convertenergy value:1000 unit:J to:kcal)
Converts volume units. (example: !convertvolume value:1 unit:liter to:gallons or $convertvolume value:1 unit:liter to:gallons)
Converts length units. (example: !convertlength value:1 unit:meters to:feet or $convertlength value:1 unit:meters to:feet)
Converts weight units. (example: !convertweight value:70 unit:kg to:pounds or $convertweight value:70 unit:kg to:pounds)
Converts data size units. (example: !convertdatasize value:1024 unit:MB to:GB or $convertdatasize value:1024 unit:MB to:GB)
Converts temperature units. (example: !converttemperature value:1 unit:C to:F or $converttemperature value:1 unit:C to:F)
Converts time units. (example: !converttime value:3600 unit:seconds to:hours or $converttime value:3600 unit:seconds to:hours)
Converts currency units. (example: !convertcurrency value:1 unit:USD to:EUR or $convertcurrency value:1 unit:USD to:EUR)
Provides a list of colors with their hexadecimal values.
This command results a reset of warnings for chat to original state due to user prompted by one (or more) bad words in chat. (its for admins only)
Generates random number (usage: $rng number:10 or !rng number:10)
Returns the list of all avaliable timezones (usage: $listtimezones target:native) (options: native, thirdpartylib)
It displays the list of rules for usage of this chatbot

Send a feedback message (by library nodemailer) to the creator of this webapp (usage: $feedback from:[from] name:[name] subject:[subject] content:[content] contenthtml:[contenthtml?], note: the symbol ? is optional)
Set the theme for chatbot (usage: $theme name:[name]) (options: default, matrix, liquidglass, glassmorphism, visionglass, red, green, blue, yellow, etc...)
